Program_Info.Program_Change_Info: Implemented multilingual support, making the application interface now available in 19 languages.

English.Char_Desc_45: Automated screenshot saver synced to clicks.
English.Char_Desc_80: Auto-captures and saves screenshots in sync with your left-click operations.
English.Char_Desc_250: ClickCapture is a background utility that automatically captures screenshots in sync with your mouse's left-click actions. Record your entire workflow as images without conscious effort. Smart filtering prevents saving duplicate identical images.
English.Char_Desc_450: ClickCapture is a background utility that automatically captures and saves screenshots in sync with your left-click operations. Ideal for creating operation manuals, it features Smart Duplicate Filtering to prevent saving unchanged screens. It requires no installation, runs quietly, and can be toggled via a customizable hotkey (default is F9, F8 also available). Fully functional for personal use. A Pro license is required for enterprise domain environments.
English.Char_Desc_2000:
Everything you need, captured just by clicking.
ClickCapture is a background utility that automatically captures and saves screenshots in sync with your mouse's "left-click" actions. Whether you are creating operation manuals or recording parameter settings during software installations, you can record your entire workflow as images without any conscious effort.
Key Features: - Click-Synced Capture: Automatically saves the target window or entire screen as an image every time you click. - Smart Duplicate Filtering: Intelligently skips saving if the screen remains unchanged, preventing your folders from overflowing with identical images. - Auto Clipboard Transfer: Copies the captured image directly to your clipboard for instant pasting. - Instant ON/OFF via Hotkey: If you no longer need to capture during your work, simply press the assigned hotkey (default is "F9", "F8" is also available) to instantly toggle the capture feature ON or OFF. - Lightweight & Portable: Requires no installation and no runtimes. Runs as a single, standalone executable in the system tray.
Main Use Cases: - Creating operation manuals and guides - Recording installer parameters - Collecting screens for e-learning/presentations - Recording UI elements for RPA development
Editions: ClickCapture is fully functional with no limits as the Free Edition for personal use. A Pro Edition license (unrestricted, commercial use OK) is required when running the software on domain-joined PCs or enterprise environments.
